subject: A formally dressed authority figure in a dark suit gesturing commandingly, labeled as Giovanni within the card art frame
description: A sharply dressed figure in a dark suit with a red rose boutonniere stands in a commanding pose, one arm extended in a directive gesture. The face shows a confident, imperious expression. Behind him, shadowy silhouettes of subordinates are visible in a dark indistinct setting, suggesting an entourage under his authority. The card art includes the name 'Giovanni' as a printed subtitle label within the frame. The scene reads as a powerful figure giving orders — formal authority with an undercurrent of menace. The palette is almost entirely dark and monochromatic with the red rose as the sole warm accent.
foreground: A formally dressed figure with a red rose boutonniere, arm extended in a commanding gesture
background: Shadowy silhouettes of subordinates in a dark, indistinct setting
